public_reputation: Union guildmaster whose status is expressed through office-control, contracts, and institutional hosting rather than lineage estate.
manner: Carries the habits of a guildmaster whose work is visible through daily procedure, gatekeeping, and the practical pressures of Guildheart Hub.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of guildmaster in and around Guildheart Hub, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Guildheart Hub workable through the obligations of guildmaster while managing immediate local pressure without public breakdown.
hidden_pressure: Must keep the role of guildmaster credible while absorbing strain, delay, scarcity, access pressure, or political friction tied to Guildheart Hub.

adventure_hooks.summary: Guildmaster Selene can draw the party into a practical problem centered on Guildheart Hub.
Guildmaster Selene becomes useful when the party needs access, explanation, or relief tied to the work of a guildmaster.

support_scope_notes: Created from the estate and daily-life infrastructure execution patch to make polity-native estate operations usable at table scale.
public_signal: In public, Guildmaster Selene is readable as a guildmaster tied to Guildheart Hub.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Guildheart Hub: role-relevant halls, counters, corridors, docks, archives, shrines, workshops, gates, or administrative rooms

first_impression: Guildmaster Selene presents as someone shaped by the duties of a guildmaster and the daily pressures of Guildheart Hub.
what_they_want_from_strangers: Useful clarity, respect for the work of a guildmaster, and proof that strangers will not make Guildheart Hub harder to manage.
what_they_refuse: Guildmaster Selene refuses careless disrespect, vague promises, and demands that threaten standing or workload.
how_they_create_problems: By enforcing the expectations of a guildmaster too rigidly, protecting reputation, or turning a small request into a larger obligation.
how_they_can_help: Guildmaster Selene can open local doors, explain expectations, and redirect pressure before it hardens.
escalation_if_crossed: If crossed, Guildmaster Selene adds scrutiny, delay, and locality-specific friction before direct punishment.
rumor_about_them: People say Guildmaster Selene always knows more about Guildheart Hub than is immediately visible.
best_first_scene: A first encounter works best when the party needs guidance, access, or relief tied to guildmaster duties in Guildheart Hub.
